overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunlit downtown Los Santos area. The character travels along sidewalks past commercial buildings including a clinical psychology office and hospital, crosses a street intersection with a brief pause to look around, and continues along the opposite sidewalk lined with historic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial sidewalk with medical office

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the Clinical Psychology building, maintaining a consistent pace

notable_agents.action: woman in white jacket walking toward camera while looking at phone

entered.detail: modern beige commercial building with blue signage reading 'CLINICAL PSYCHOLOGY'
row of tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
contemporary office building with reflective glass facade across the street
ornate black metal street lamps along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk bordered by palm trees on the left and commercial buildings on the right. The Clinical Psychology building is prominent, and a few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The scene is bright and clear with light traffic visible on the adjacent street.

events.description: passing the hospital entrance with visible emergency room signage and directional markers

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the hospital entrance where several people are gathered near the wall

notable_agents.action: group of people standing against the hospital wall near the entrance

entered.detail: concrete hospital building with covered entranceway and emergency signage
red illuminated 'EMERGENCY' sign above the hospital entrance
large blue and white directional sign listing hospital departments
multi-level parking structure entrance with height clearance bar

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a hospital entrance with prominent emergency signage and a directional directory. The sidewalk continues alongside the hospital complex with landscaped greenery and a parking garage entrance visible ahead. Several pedestrians stand near the hospital wall, and the palm trees now line the immediate left side of the path.

events.description: character steps onto the yellow tactile paving and enters the crosswalk
character stops in the center of the crosswalk and looks around in a 360-degree turn
character resumes walking to complete crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, stopping in the middle to look around at the surroundings, then continuing to the opposite side

notable_agents.action: black sedan waiting at the red traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: broad asphalt crosswalk with white striping and yellow tactile warning pads
large historic white building with multiple blue awnings visible across the intersection
tall traffic signal showing red light for vehicles

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide intersection crosswalk, stops in the center to survey the surroundings with a full rotation, then continues crossing. A historic white building with blue awnings dominates the view across the street, while a black sedan waits at the red light. The open intersection provides full sky visibility and direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial district with stone architecture

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk past historic buildings with storefront awnings and decorative stonework

notable_agents.action: woman in pink dress walking on the sidewalk while looking at her phone

entered.detail: historic stone building with large arched windows and decorative masonry
white canvas awning extending over the sidewalk from the stone building
wooden bench on the sidewalk near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character now walks along a sidewalk lined with historic stone commercial buildings featuring storefront awnings. The architecture shifts to older, more ornate styles with decorative facades. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and the street features parked cars and urban street furniture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit downtown district that transitions from modern commercial facilities to a historic urban corridor. It begins with the character walking along a bright sidewalk past a clinical psychology office and palm trees, moving steadily toward a hospital entrance marked by emergency signage and landscaped greenery. As the character reaches a wide intersection, the camera pauses for a full rotation to survey the open street and a waiting black sedan before continuing across the crosswalk. The scene then shifts as the character steps onto the opposite sidewalk, where the modern hospital complex gives way to a row of ornate, historic stone buildings with decorative facades and blue awnings. Finally, the movement continues past these older storefronts and parked cars, blending the city's clinical architecture with its traditional commercial heritage.
